description: Apply a horizontal and vertical offset to nudge an element from its anchor position without changing the logical attachment point.
utility: Offset element position by col/row amount in logical units

arguments.name: col
arguments.description: Horizontal offset in logical units (positive = right, negative = left)

arguments.name: row
arguments.description: Vertical offset in logical units (positive = down, negative = up). If omitted, col value is used as a single directional offset.

alternates.description: Offset by col horizontally and row vertically
Label offset right and down from point

examples.scenario: Label left and up from an angle

examples.expression: label_3 = label(graph_1, at(item(triangle_1, type(edge), 1)), "?", buff(0, 0.5), rotation(0))
